'''Abo Dreth''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]], thriving with lakes and rivers but with a [[Nitrogen/Legends|nitrogen]]-based [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]].

==Description==
Abo Dreth was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Abo Dreth system/Legends|Abo Dreth system]], within the [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="TEA" /> Located in the [[Tingel Arm/Legends|Tingel Arm]], it was large and, at least from [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]], dark brown in [[Color/Legends|color]], and its terrain was sprinkled with hundreds of silver lakes and rivers. The [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]] was Type III,<ref name="PX" /> [[Nitrogen/Legends|nitrogen]]-based,<ref name="SWE" /> and the planet was thus rich in that gas, while a [[Breath mask/Legends|breath mask]] was required to travel on or near the surface. The planet was mostly known for its vast number of vicious [[Bird/Legends|avians]]. Its [[Galactic coordinates/Legends|galactic coordinates]] were S-3.<ref name="TEA" />

==History==
In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], the renowned [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]] executive [[Hart-and-Parn Gorra-Fiolla]] landed on the planet with a [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoner]] named [[Naven Crel]]. She had been assigned to look for a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] cell but was instead led into a trap planned by her own boss, [[Chils Meplin]], an Authority [[Prex]]. Meplin had discovered that Crel knew about him selling CSA secrets to the Empire. The ensuing confrontation resulted in the [[Death/Legends|deaths]] of both a woman by the name of [[Akeeli Somerce]], who was Meplin's assistant and had been assigned to [[Assassin/Legends|assassinate]] Crel, and Fiolla's prisoner. Fiolla left the planet soon after.<ref name="PX" />

==Behind the scenes==
Abo Dreth first appeared in the [[1997]] [[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine 12|''Star Wars Galaxy Magazine'' 12]] article ''[[Priority: X]]'', a short story written by [[George R. Strayton]]. Later, it was mentioned in the [[2008]] ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' and again in ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'', written by [[Jason Fry]] and [[Daniel Wallace]], and published in [[2009]]. The planet was mentioned once more within ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'', published in [[2012]].
